label: SPC Wei Chen — Air Force, Disability Discharge, Short Service, IT Specialist

dd214.name: Chen, Wei M.
dd214.dutyLocations: Joint Base San Antonio-Lackland TX, Langley Air Force Base VA
dd214.remarks: Separated by Administrative Action due to service-related disability sustained during initial skills training. Medical evaluation board recommended disability separation with 30% combined rating. Characterized as Honorable discharge due to disability.

vaRecords.provider: Langley Air Force Base Medical Group
vaRecords.notes: Trainee reported severe anxiety symptoms during technical training phase. Sleep disturbance and inability to concentrate affecting training performance. Medical evaluation initiated.

vaRecords.provider: VA Hampton Roads Health Care System
vaRecords.notes: Medical Evaluation Board determined service member unable to continue active duty due to service-related condition. Rated at 30% for anxiety disorder. Recommended discharge with separation pay.

summary.functionalImpact: Anxiety limits ability to work in high-pressure environments. Sleep disturbance affects daytime functioning.
